templateDescription: Sample CloudFormation template with over-provisioned and unused resources for testing

issues.title: EC2 Instance May Be Over-Provisioned
issues.description: Instance "WebServer" uses m5.4xlarge. If utilization is below 30%, consider downsizing to m5.2xlarge.
issues.recommendation: Downsize from m5.4xlarge to m5.2xlarge to save $280.32/month.

issues.title: EC2 Instance May Be Over-Provisioned
issues.description: Instance "AppServer" uses r5.2xlarge. If utilization is below 30%, consider downsizing to r5.xlarge.
issues.recommendation: Downsize from r5.2xlarge to r5.xlarge to save $183.96/month.

issues.title: GPU Instance Review Recommended
issues.description: Instance "BatchProcessor" uses GPU instance type p3.2xlarge. GPU instances are expensive. Ensure GPU capabilities are required.
issues.recommendation: If no GPU workloads are running, switch to a general-purpose instance like m5.xlarge to save significantly.

issues.title: Unattached EBS Volume
issues.description: Volume "OrphanedVolume" is not attached to any EC2 instance in this template. Unattached volumes incur storage costs without providing value.
issues.recommendation: Remove the volume if no longer needed, or attach it to an instance.

issues.title: Provisioned IOPS Volume Review
issues.description: Volume "OrphanedVolume" uses io1 with 3000 IOPS. Provisioned IOPS volumes are significantly more expensive.
issues.recommendation: If high IOPS are not consistently needed, switch to gp3 to save $217.50/month.

issues.title: Unattached EBS Volume
issues.description: Volume "OldBackupVolume" is not attached to any EC2 instance in this template. Unattached volumes incur storage costs without providing value.
issues.recommendation: Remove the volume if no longer needed, or attach it to an instance.

issues.title: Use gp3 Instead of gp2
issues.description: Volume "OldBackupVolume" uses gp2. gp3 volumes are 20% cheaper with better baseline performance.
issues.recommendation: Switch from gp2 to gp3 to save $20.00/month.

issues.title: RDS Instance May Be Over-Provisioned
issues.description: RDS instance "Database" uses db.r5.4xlarge. If database utilization is low, consider downsizing.
issues.recommendation: Downsize from db.r5.4xlarge to db.r5.2xlarge to save $1401.60/month.

issues.title: RDS Storage Type Review
issues.description: RDS instance "Database" uses io1 storage with 3000 provisioned IOPS. This is expensive.
issues.recommendation: If high IOPS are not required, switch to gp2/gp3 to save $5.00/month.

issues.title: Load Balancer Without Targets
issues.description: Load balancer "UnusedALB" has no target groups defined in this template. An idle ALB/NLB still incurs hourly charges.
issues.recommendation: Add target groups or remove the load balancer if unused.

issues.title: Unassociated Elastic IP
issues.description: Elastic IP "UnusedEIP" is not associated with any instance or NAT Gateway. Unassociated EIPs cost $0.005/hour.
issues.recommendation: Associate the EIP with a resource or release it.

issues.title: Unassociated Elastic IP
issues.description: Elastic IP "SpareEIP" is not associated with any instance or NAT Gateway. Unassociated EIPs cost $0.005/hour.
issues.recommendation: Associate the EIP with a resource or release it.

cost.details: NAT Gateway hourly charge (excludes data processing)

issues.title: NAT Gateway Cost Review
issues.description: NAT Gateway "NatGateway" costs $0.045/hour plus data charges. Consider whether this is necessary for non-production environments.
issues.recommendation: For development, consider using NAT instances or VPC endpoints instead.

issues.title: DynamoDB High Provisioned Throughput
issues.description: DynamoDB table "SessionTable" has 1000 RCU and 1000 WCU provisioned. High provisioned throughput can be costly if not fully utilized.
issues.recommendation: Consider switching to on-demand billing or enabling auto-scaling. Potential savings: $398.58/month.

issues.title: ElastiCache Node May Be Over-Provisioned
issues.description: Cache cluster "CacheCluster" uses cache.r5.xlarge. If cache utilization is low, consider downsizing.
issues.recommendation: Downsize from cache.r5.xlarge to cache.r5.large to save $165.71/month.

recommendations.recommendation: If no GPU workloads are running, switch to a general-purpose instance like m5.xlarge to save significantly.
